'''Kal'Falnl C'ndros''' (sometimes known as '''Kal Fal''') was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Quor'sav/Legends|Quor'sav]] trader.

==Biography==
Kal'Falnl C'ndros was a 3.5 meter tall freelance [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], whose size required her to own a custom-built ship, the ''[[Shelltooth]]'', with corridors tall enough to accommodate her. She was widely regarded as being an overprotective mother, and her maternal instincts included not only her own eggs but also her clients and friends, especially the [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] trader [[Rycar Ryjerd/Legends|Rycar Ryjerd]].<ref name="SWCCG" /><ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref> Her brood of eggs was scooped out by [[Kitik Keed'kak]], a [[Yam'rii/Legends|Yam'rii]] female, with covetous intent.<ref name="DB-Keed'kak, Kitik">{{DB|character|kitikkeedkak|Keed'kak, Kitik}}</ref>

For a time after picking him up at a stopover on [[Yuvern/Legends|Yuvern]], C'ndros trained the young [[Yuvernian/Legends|Yuvernian]] [[Cane Adiss/Legends|Cane Adiss]] how to pilot starships. They visited dozens of worlds before going their separate ways on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="DB Cane Adiss">{{DB|character|caneadiss|Adiss, Cane}}</ref>

[[File:Kalfalnl-cndros.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Kal'Falnl C'ndros's legs (in silhouette) in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].]]

She was wandering in the streets of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] while [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were selling Luke's old [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|X-34 landspeeder]] to [[Vuvrian/Legends|Vuvrian]] alien [[Wioslea/Legends|Wioslea]].<ref name="Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope">{{Film|IV}}</ref><ref name="SWCCG" />

C'ndros was one of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] contacted by [[Mal Biron]] to transport one of several mysterious packages from [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] to an undisclosed location. As the sole crewmember aboard the ''Shelltooth'', she felt somewhat disadvantaged, seeking out help from several other smugglers also contacted by Biron. Whether they assisted her is unknown, though it is known that C'ndros was one of the earliest arrivals at the first checkpoint, near the [[Novolek Beacon/Legends|Novolek Beacon]].<ref name="Secrets of the Sisar Run" />

==Behind the scenes==
The mysterious pair of legs first appearing in {{Film|IV}}<ref name="Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope" /> went unnamed until [[1995]], when [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Premiere Limited]]'' set of cards for the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] first identified them as belonging to Kal'Falnl C'ndros, a member of the [[Quor'sav/Legends|Quor'sav]] species.<ref name="SWCCG" />
